majors.notes: explicit official page sentence; titles extracted from official page: https://bulletins.psu.edu/azindex/

admissions.testing_policy: Penn State is test-optional for first-year applicants; students can decide whether SAT or ACT scores should be considered, and scores are not required for the application.
admissions.gpa_policy: No explicit minimum GPA was found on the cited official pages used in this auto-enrichment pass.

evidence.source_excerpt: Pursuing a Penn State degree means access to faculty experts and state-of-the-art resources that will help you make an impact on the world. Explore all degree options ranging from more than 275 undergraduate majors, including top-ranked programs like engineering and business, to more than 300 graduate and professional programs, including medical and legal studies.

evidence.claim: If you have applied to the Accelerated Premedical-Medical Program , SAT or ACT scores are required for consideration and and must be submitted by program's October 14 deadline.
evidence.source_excerpt: If you have applied to the Accelerated Premedical-Medical Program , SAT or ACT scores are required for consideration and and must be submitted by program's October 14 deadline.

evidence.claim: Continue developing your expertise with a professional degree from Penn State’s law school or medical schools. Experience rigorous courses, hands-on learning environments, and a powerful alumni network that will help you build connections in your industry.

warnings: Major titles extracted from official school source (901 titles).
Phase 5 auto-enrichment completed using official-school web crawl heuristics; manual spot-checking is still recommended for edge cases.
GPA policy was normalized from absence of an explicit minimum-GPA statement on the cited official pages.
School-people enrichment uses public third-party sources (RateMyProfessors and Wikipedia/Wikimedia), so rankings are heuristic rather than official university data.
admissions.course_rigor was reset to unknown during manual cleanup because the earlier auto-extracted text was unrelated to the requested admissions field.
admissions.recommendations was reset to unknown during manual cleanup because the earlier auto-extracted text was unrelated to the requested admissions field.
Penn State testing policy was manually repaired from the official test-optional FAQ after the auto-crawl captured a program-specific exception.

popular_professors.ranking_basis: RateMyProfessors entries sorted by rating_count desc, then average_rating desc, then would_take_again_percent desc.
popular_professors.source_summary: Matched RateMyProfessors school 'Pennsylvania State University - York' (legacyId=1301) and ranked all professors with at least one rating.

successful_alumni.ranking_basis: Wikipedia list/category candidates ranked by trailing-365-day Wikipedia pageviews.
successful_alumni.source_summary: Candidates were harvested from school-specific Wikipedia alumni/people pages or categories, filtered to likely people, then ranked by pageviews.
